title: Workplace Hazardous Products Program newsletter - Canada.ca
content:
## Workplace Hazardous Products Program newsletter
Keep up to date on the Workplace Hazardous Products Program, from the publication of education material to claims for exemption process updates, stakeholder meeting information, comment opportunities and other regulatory information about the Hazardous Products Act and the Hazardous Materials Information Review Act and their regulations.
Subscribe for updates
